evalAfter: (async()=>{const r={};const w=ms=>new Promise(s=>setTimeout(s,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(2500);try{r.version=(await fetch('https://levo19.github.io/MOS/version.json?b='+Date.now()).then(x=>x.json())).version;}catch(_){}try{MOS.nav('catalogo')}catch(e){r.navErr=String(e)}await w(6500);try{MOS._paso2Abrir([{idCanonico:'IDPRO0000020',costoNuevo:32,costoAnterior:26}],'TEST-P2')}catch(e){r.p2Err=String(e)}await w(1400);const m=document.getElementById('paso2Modal');r.p2Abierto=!!m;if(m){const sats=[...m.querySelectorAll('[style*="border-left:2px solid"]')];r.satelites=sats.length;r.satTxt=sats.slice(0,4).map(e=>e.textContent.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim());r.cta=(m.querySelector('button[onclick*=_paso2AplicarAutos]')||{}).textContent.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();}return r;})()
